race.comment: SHOW US YA TEXTS (11) finished out of the money when fresh from a spell two starts back then was beaten 5.5 lengths when fourth in a 1350m contest at Beaumont (Newcastle) two-and-a-half weeks ago. Finds an easier assignment and can take this out. NEVER A DOUBT (1) showed good early speed and raced on the pace last start before fading to finish fifth over 1400m at Scone. Sure to be prominent from the outset. TRUST A KITTY (5) is experiencing a long win drought, extended last start when fourth over 1600m at Orange. Best figures measure up nicely. Can do a lot better at this level.
